name: Sprint 9 (unofficial)
note: No Jira sprint object created. Date-range release covering Apr 20 - May 2, 2026. Overlaps Sprint 8 (Apr 14-28) tail end + 4 days of post-Sprint 8 work. Cut 2 days short of planned May 4 end due to cadence change.

tickets.note: Tickets resolved within Apr 20 - May 2 window only. Sprint 8 backlog (still active in Jira) tracked separately.

points.note: All 7 resolved tickets unpointed - estimation discipline gap continues from Sprint 8.

completion.note: 100% of in-window tickets resolved. % is misleading because Sprint 8 carryover not counted.

goals: BrightSignals proactive notifications - end-to-end Slack delivery
Bedrock Converse migration for brightbot agent

carry_over.note: Sprint 8 still active in Jira - carryover analysis deferred to Sprint 8 close.

brightsignals.name: BrightSignals - Proactive Notifications
brightsignals.description: End-to-end proactive Slack notifications: subscriptions, poller, delivery, S3 attachments (Tier A + B envelope parser), notification dispatcher Lambda.

bedrock_migration.name: Bedrock Converse Migration
bedrock_migration.description: ChatBedrock to ChatBedrockConverse migration + deepagents upgrade. Foundation for production Bedrock agent runtime.

task_scheduler.name: Task Scheduler MVP
task_scheduler.description: Cross-repo agnostic scheduler MVP - core service + UI + brightbot integration.

streaming_platform.name: Streaming Platform Hardening
streaming_platform.description: Span streaming FSM guards, property tests via Hypothesis, clock injection (kill 21s of time.sleep), prototype removal, Cognito + Neo4j adapters.

synapse_bugs.name: Synapse + Ingestion Fixes
synapse_bugs.description: Synapse logic + role assumption, mixed-case duplicate prevention, ingestion stack hardening.

duplicate_check.name: Upload Duplicate Detection
duplicate_check.description: Duplicate check across data assets and files, server-side + UI.
